name: Cross Bank
description_short: Cross Bank is a community bank offering personal and business checking, savings, loans, and credit products with FDIC insurance across Arkansas locations.
description_long: Cross Bank is a traditional community bank operating in Arkansas with multiple locations including Wynne, Jonesboro, Blytheville, and Osceola. The bank is FDIC-insured and backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government, providing deposit protection up to applicable limits. Founded as a regional financial institution, Cross Bank has developed a full-service banking model serving both retail and commercial customers in their markets. The bank offers a comprehensive suite of personal banking products including multiple checking account tiers (Free Kasasa Cash Checking, InControl Checking, Premium Gold accounts, Basic Checking), savings options (Kasasa Saver, standard savings, money market accounts), certificates of deposit, and individual retirement accounts. On the lending side, Cross Bank provides personal loans, auto loans, RV loans, and home financing including mortgages, construction loans, and home equity products. They also offer personal credit cards and overdraft coverage options. For business customers, Cross Bank provides commercial checking and savings accounts, business loans, small business loans, agricultural loans, equipment financing, lines of credit, merchant card services, and cash management tools like remote deposit capture and ACH origination. Cross Bank distinguishes itself through its emphasis on community banking and local service, with accessible branch locations in smaller Arkansas markets rather than national presence. The bank provides financial education resources and tools, supports small business growth specifically, and offers both traditional and Kasasa-branded account products. Their digital offerings include online banking, mobile app access (iOS and Android), person-to-person payments, and paperless eStatements. The bank maintains accessibility standards with AudioEye-enabled website optimization. As a regional community bank, Cross Bank is best suited for customers in Arkansas seeking personalized local service and relationships with their financial institution. However, the bank's geographic footprint is limited to Arkansas locations, and the website provides minimal detail on specific rates, fees, loan terms, or competitive advantages against national banks or credit unions. Customers requiring nationwide branch access or specialized financial products may find larger institutions more suitable.
services: Personal checking accounts (6 tiers including Kasasa Cash Checking)
Personal savings products (Kasasa Saver, savings accounts, money market, CDs, IRAs)
Home mortgages, construction loans, and home equity loans
Small business loans and agricultural loans
Equipment loans and operating lines of credit
Merchant card services and business debit cards
Remote deposit capture and ACH origination
Online banking, mobile banking, and bill pay services
pros: FDIC-insured deposits with full U.S. Government backing
Multiple checking account options including free Kasasa Cash Checking with rewards
Comprehensive lending products: personal loans, auto, RV, home mortgages, construction, and home equity loans
Dedicated small business and agricultural loan programs with cash management services
Mobile banking app available on both iOS and Android platforms
Financial education resources and tools provided free to customers
Remote deposit capture and ACH origination for business customers
cons: Geographic limitation: only operates in Arkansas (Wynne, Jonesboro, Blytheville, Osceola areas)
No specific interest rates, APRs, or fee structures published on website
Limited information about loan approval timelines or lending criteria
No mention of investment products, wealth management, or advisory services
Minimal detail on how Kasasa rewards accounts work or earning rate specifics
best_for: Small business owners in Arkansas seeking local banking relationships and commercial lending
Agricultural customers needing farm loans and equipment financing in rural Arkansas
Customers preferring community banking with in-person service over national chains
Individuals in Arkansas seeking bundled personal banking (checking, savings, loans, credit)
diagnosis: Cross Bank is best for individuals and small businesses located in Arkansas seeking traditional community banking with local branch relationships, FDIC-insured deposits, and comprehensive lending options. The primary caveat is geographic limitation to Arkansas markets; customers outside this region cannot access the bank, and those seeking national reach or detailed rate/fee comparisons should research alternatives, as the website lacks specific pricing information.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
